title: Epic Knights: Slavic Armory
description: Adds medieval Slavic armor and weapons to the game
body:
With the Epic Knights: Slavic Armory addon, you can immerse yourself in the rich history of the Slavic people, as it adds 61 items of chainmail, lamellar and plate armor, helmets and new weapons.
The addon requires [Epic Knights](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons) mod with all its dependencies to be installed.
![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24ede4a562957dbd1dbae5638dc77069279337e7.png)
